reviews.review_description: I was just on my VR talking to my friends and some people came up and they were the owners and staff of water tag three and when I was so the owner of the game the playtime manager the IP banned them and they threatened to dodge all of us and they did and so please do not get the game. It is really really bad. Terrible stuff. Halloween 23 update and don't play it please I'm warning you guys now do not play this whatsoever( owner zues is the only nice one)

This game is really fun it’s just like gorilla tag I joined the discord and I seen that if I make a video and it gets 500 views you get finger painter I got 500 and I go then finger painter and it’s really fun I get glaze in some lobby’s and I get to be with fun people this game has active mods and owner and forest guide I want to get the forest guide so I can help out the community

I got banned for cheating even though I didn't do anything I'm banned for 72 hours  
I held the pride flag and got banned I might have to quit playing

Spookymonkey banned me he is a mod, I was in his lobby and I got banned you guys should take away his stick he banned me for the pride flag
W

As a finger painter and stick i love this game and i like the small community, nice people, and cool features. I have played Water Tag for a while now and it is just the best so if you’re gonna get the game, check this review first. Bye : )

i got banned for no reson and made fun of by the head admin and i and just a chill guy playing the game and then i went to the city map and the head admin tryed to ip ban me and the modterater banned me and i got kicked out of the game !
When I joined, I was so excited to have my cosmetics and the stick and mods, but ￼I never got mod so dear god pls just add back the mods and my cosmetics one more thing pls add back the free stick s

Its just like gorilla tag and you get a free mod menu
 and it has custom cosmetics and it has multiple flashbacks in the game.

this is a good gamr but i got ban for one week for no reason but I’m kind but when I got accused of being toxic I don’t become toxic but this one guy blamed media being toxic so many times so I became toxic  ￼￼
There r so nice staff w owners maybe not Lucas but yea momkey is the owner and he is SUPER HOT please play this game it’s to sigma
